name: Lazarian Polystyrene Insulated Concrete Forms
description: Lazarian Insulated Concrete Forms e(ICFs) are interlocking blocks produced from either expanded polystyrene (EPS) or expanded polyurethane (EPU).

taxonomy.sub_category: Lazarian Polystyrene Insulated Concrete Forms Updated on March 4, 2024 · Created on July 26, 2016 Lazarian Polystyrene Insulated Concrete Forms Upcoming Update Lazarian Insulated Concrete Forms e(ICFs) are interlocking blocks produced from either expanded polystyrene (EPS) or expanded polyurethane (EPU). Developed By Lazarian World Homes Tested By Lazarian Polystyrene Insulated Concrete Forms Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Upcoming Update Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Lazarian Insulated Concrete Forms (ICFs) are blocks made of expanded polystyrene (EPS) or expanded polyurethane (EPU) that interlock for construction purposes. Target SDGs SDG 11: Sustainable Cities and Communities SDG 12: Responsible Consumption and Production Market Suggested Retail Price $25.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Community, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations Lazarian World Homes Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include NRG Insulated Block . Manufacturing/Building Method Lazarian World Homes brings the machine, chemicals, and molds to the site that are necessary to produce the polyurethane blocks. The cement and gravel for the concrete and the rebar are obtained locally and brought to the site. Intellectural Property Type Patent User Provision Model Individuals and organizations can reach out to Lazarian World Homes with a project proposal. Lazarian World Homes works as a product manufacturer, installing contractor, and donor/fundraising organization. Their services come together and cannot be obtained separately. Distributions to Date Status 104 projects have been completed and 3 are in progress. Unit dimensions (cm) 121.9 (L) x 30.5 (H) x 20.3 (W) cm 3 Primary materials Styrofoam Complimentary materials N/A Fire Resistance (hr) Unknown Thermal Insulation Capacity 20-25 R-Value Compressive Strength (MPa) Unknown Suitable Climates With the appropriate modifications to the building designs, the product could be suitable for all climates. Design Specifications The assembling of walls requires four styrofoam pieces, which include the Standard and Lintel Block, a Plug, and the End Cap. The Standard Wall Block and Lintel/Header Block comprise the main pieces. These blocks are 121.9 x 30.5 x 20.3 cm 3 and weigh about 1.4 kg. The blocks interlock for assembly. It uses 3/8 rebar and concrete into holes/studs every 40.6 cm on-center throughout the wall and the same is done through the lintel block every 120 cm from the ground to structurally tie the building vertically and horizontally. Technical Support Lazarian World Homes does not provide ongoing technical support. The user would need to contact a general building contractor. Replacement Components Since Lazarian World Homes builds homes and does not sell the blocks as a separate product, a user would likely have to obtain additional blocks from elsewhere. Lifecycle Lazarian World Homes projects an economic life of 40-50 years. They also suggest that the blocks can be recycled by grinding up the foam and mixing it into gardens for easier watering, or mixing as an additive into concrete blocks. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Lazarian World Homes claims that their homes are durable, affordable, and eco-friendly (because they are high insulating). Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety Workers are subject to the general dangers of a construction site that include working from heights and with machinery and sharp tools. EPS and EPU are combustible and therefore many codes require a thermal barrier such as drywall or plaster as a finish on the ICF. Complementary Technical Systems The Polyurethane Portable Factory is one of the machines used to create the blocks and can be purchased from E-Z Flow Foam Packaging Systems. Academic Research and References “About”, Lazarian World Homes, accessed on March 4, 2024, https://lazarianworldhomes.com/about/ Compliance with regulations Unknown Other Information Lazarian World Homes has the building designs available for download “Products”, EZ Flow Foam, accessed on March 4, 2024, https://www.ezflofoam.com/products/ EPS Codes can be found in EPSIndustry.org Leave a Reply You must be logged in to post a comment.
